subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-08-06
subcodes.first_line: The gathering storm is most portentous! Mankind is gripped in the paroxysm of a fearful alarm
subcodes.subjects: @nationalism; love of country, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @spiritual transformation, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @war and peace, @power of love, @unity; oneness of humanity, @oneness; unity of religion
